channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: I raised $15 million without VC in a capital-heavy sector. Here's what I learned
item.description: Chasing institutional capital in mobility is a trap; building with private money forced the discipline the industry lacked.

item.title: Box CEO says Silicon Valley layoffs show tech CEOs suffer from 'AI psychosis'
item.description: Box CEO Aaron Levie said tech executives see only AI's 'happy path,' while employees working with the tech see a fuller picture.

item.title: ADP chief economist shares 3 takeaways on how AI is changing work
item.description: 'No one ever promised a 50-year cycle for white-collar work,' the ADP chief economist told Fortune, but knowledge work isn't dying either.

item.title: Conference Board: Job satisfaction hits a 39-year high, but AI threatens to undo gains for half of workers
item.description: American workers reached a record high in job satisfaction, but AI could reverse that unless companies treat access and training as essentials.
